name: redc-plugin-upload-r2
description: 场景部署后将生成的配置文件上传到 Cloudflare R2 存储桶
description_en: Upload generated config files to Cloudflare R2 bucket after deployment
author: wgpsec

bucket_name.description: R2 存储桶名称 (默认从 tfvars 读取 buckets_name，兜底 test)

bucket_path.description: R2 存储桶内路径 (默认从 tfvars 读取 buckets_path)

filename.description: 要上传的文件名 (默认从 tfvars 读取 filename，兜底 default-config.yaml)
